name: Lazy Pigs in a Blanket
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 375 degrees F (190 C).
2. Spread a layer of shredded cabbage in the bottom of a 9 x 13-inch pan or casserole dish.
3. In a bowl, mix together ground beef, eggs, cooked rice, chopped onion, garlic salt, and pepper.
4. Layer the meat mixture on top of the cabbage.
5. Add another layer of shredded cabbage on top of the meat mixture.
6. Pour water and tomato soup over the cabbage layers.
7. Bake for 1 hour or until the pigs in a blanket are thoroughly cooked and heated through.
